_schema: Patti — the gossip surface. Director-authored text (2026-07-03), verbatim. The gossip node pulls from data/gossip.json: flagged banks (things YOU did) outrank general county talk.
_status: director_approved; intro variants and text_rules added ai_draft_needs_director_curation (2026-07-06)

intro.speaker: patti
intro.text: County's been talking. Question is whether they're talking good or talking interesting.
variants: You keep giving people stories and I'll keep serving pie.
Ash Creek runs on coffee and speculation.

Sit anywhere.

News finds you either way.

You want the special, or the speculation?

One of them's free.

text_rules.text:
There he is.

Half the county's had you on their place this month.

Folks are starting to argue over who gets your Saturdays.

Heard that tractor of yours before I saw you.

Whole diner's got opinions about it. Two of them are even kind.

lead.speaker: patti
lead.text: Word travels quicker than trucks around here.

gossip.speaker: patti
gossip.text: Word travels quicker than trucks around here.
